prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of MU (Micron Technology), the stock exhibits high volatility typical of semiconductor stocks. Using a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated annual volatility of ~45% and assuming neutral drift, the 20-day forecast shows moderate upward bias reflecting recent semiconductor sector momentum. Confidence intervals widen significantly due to the stock's inherent volatility and 20-day time horizon.
